title: Crunchy German Kale Stir Fry
description: A delicious and easy-to-make German-inspired stir fry with crunchy texture and nutritious kale.

ingredients.name: Crunchy
ingredients.amount: 1 cup, chopped (e.g. fried onions or crispy bacon bits)

instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the kale and cook until wilted.
Add the crunchy topping and caraway seeds. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
